data.body: bffe (heroic-rowable-watussi) SUBSTANTIVELY DONE: generated ed25519 bot keypair (fp SHA256:PU4nHIqJ...), created identity ticket 594c-9dcf-5ad6-4e6d 'Rebar Bot' (unsinkable-varying-pelican) w/ pubkey registered, provisioned PRIVATE key to SSM SecureString /rebar/prod/rebar-bot-signing-key (byte-verified) + GH Actions secret REBAR_BOT_SIGNING_KEY, added param to ssm.tf rebar_secret_params (IaC). AC1/AC2(resolve_current_identity->bot)/AC3 all verified. ssm.tf change committed 34d0f39 + pushed for review; bffe closes after its Verified+1. 297d + bffe claimed (both plan-reviews PASS+signed after remediation). Private key held in secure job tmp for later signing-seam testing (9e76), discard at Phase 2 end. REMAINING Phase 2: 9e76 (reconciler seam inline-sign + bridge YAML), 245e (fetch-secrets.sh + container config), 1787 (canary YAML), 472f (local dev docs), ad42 (conftest guard), cc0b (verify-identity CI mounts store), then close 297d + epic + land.
